data.name: Dual Family I - IX
data.detailed_description:
THE STORY

A wife and husband can no longer stand each other – for more reasons they care to claim for. With their past love crushed and household seemingly splitting at the seams, an exhausted wife seeks sexual validation. A faultless young woman begins her inevitable sexual awakening. Choose your role and witness two perspectives of one household falling to pieces, grasping for any possible signs of love in their descent.

THE GAME

Dual Family will repeatedly test you with a multitude of scenario-based choices that will influence the relationship with your friends, as well as the ending of the story arc. Do you just want a hug, something platonic? Or perhaps you desire something fiercer, more intimate; a kiss on the lips without hesitation. For those still unsatiated, you may find yourself wanting even more.


Regardless what you seek in your relationships, there's much to explore in the story Dual Family offers. Troublemaker or stoicist, lover or friend; it's all in your hands.

THE DEVELOPMENT

The steam version includes the first 18 chapters (split between both campaigns) of Dual Family as a stand alone release; Part X, the finale for Act I will be released as a separate, stand alone installment (it's a big one) after it's already launched on my site. Many of the earlier installments in the story are far shorter than those found later, the most recent being the longest yet. The complete story (three acts!) will be added to steam as development continues, each act being released as its own game.


For the sound/soundtrack, the steam build has only a handful of in-game sound effects and no music; original tracks as heard in the trailer will be included in future installments, but our priority has always been story first.


Enjoy! :]

data.short_description: Choose one of two characters and experience the same splitting household from opposing perspectives. With choices made in these dual campaigns being completely up to you, make or break the relationships with those you hold dear!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
